product.name: Women's Black Cropped Hoodie with White Logo
product.description: Comfort and style rolled in one — that's the easiest way to describe this fashion-forward hoodie. It serves as a great statement piece in any wardrobe, and with its trendy raw hem and matching drawstrings the hoodie is bound to become a true favorite.

seo.title: Commerce Layer Store
seo.description: Commerce Layer is a transactional commerce API that lets you add multi-market ecommerce to any digital experience, with ease.
